member.name: M:Origam.Security.Common.AccountMailSender.GenerateMail(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Generates and return MailMessage ready to send with smtp. Firstly try to use a template from configured filename. It searches the most accurate language version of filename (e.g. when filename is 'password_reset.txt', then it finds 'password_rest.de.txt' when language is 'de-DE' and the latter file exists, but 'password_rest.de-DE.txt' doesn't exist.) If file not configured, than try to use template from resources. It tries to parse a subject from template (when a first line starts with 'Subject:', it parses the rest as a subject of an email. Then it process (replace placeholeder) a template for body and subject as well. If subject has not been found in a template, it tries to get it from configuration.
member.param: base name of template filename, a filename has to be located in the root of application diractory
a template content to be used as default one
a text of subject to be used as a default one
language IETF tag of recipient user to resolve name of the most proper template filename
list of template replacements (key-value pairs) (key:placeholer string, value:new value)

member.name: M:Origam.Security.Common.AccountMailSender.GetLocalizedMailTemplateText(System.String,System.String)
member.param: List of substitutions to be made in email template. The key of KeyValuePair is a name of placeholder in a template, the value is a new value that replace a placeholder.

member.name: T:Origam.Security.Common.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.AccountLocked
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Account is locked. Please contact the administrator..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.AccountNotConfirmed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Account is not confirmed. Please confirm it or contact the administrator..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.BusinessPartnerNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to create user through OrigamModel: BussinesPartner doesn't contain user with specified username..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.BusinessPartnerNotFoundForTheUser
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Business partner for the user {0} not found..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.ChangedPasswordMailTemplate
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to Subject: Password Reset Dear user, your password was changed. If it was not you who requested the password change, please contact your Administrator.
New Password:<%Password%>
Have a nice day Application support.

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.EmailInvalid
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to E-mail address is invalid..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.ErrorCreationOfUserFailed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Creation of user failed: {0}.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Username not found in membership database..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.FailedToSendMultiFactorAuthCode
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to send multi factor authentication code. Please contact the support..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.FailedToSendNewUserRegistrationMail
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to User registration succeeded but registration e-mail sending failed. Please contact the support..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.FailedToSendPassword
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password was changed, but application failed to send email with new password. Please contact administrator..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.FailedToSendPasswordResetToken
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to send password reset token. Please contact an administrator..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.FailedToSendUserUnlockNotification
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unlocking the user succeeded but sending notification e-mail to the user failed. Please contact the support..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.IdentityDataAlreadyAssigned
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Identity data is already assigned to the BussinessPartner..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.InvalidUsernameOrPassword
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid username and/or password..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.InvalidUsernameOrPasswordWithAttemptInfo
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Username or password is wrong. You have {0} remaining login attempts. Use "password forgotten" before your account gets blocked..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_DuplicateEmail
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to A username for that e-mail address already exists. Please enter a different e-mail address..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_DuplicateUserName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Username already exists. Please enter a different user name..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_InvalidAnswer
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The password retrieval answer provided is invalid. Please check the value and try again..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_InvalidEmail
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The e-mail address provided is invalid. Please check the value and try again..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_InvalidPassword
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The password provided is invalid. Please enter a valid password value..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_InvalidQuestion
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The password retrieval question provided is invalid. Please check the value and try again..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_InvalidUserName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The user name provided is invalid. Please check the value and try again..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_ProviderError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The authentication provider returned an error. Please verify your entry and try again. If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_Unknown
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to An unknown error occurred. Please verify your entry and try again. If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.MembershipCreateStatus_UserRejected
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The user creation request has been canceled. Please verify your entry and try again. If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.NewPasswordForm
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to New Password:.

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.No2FAProvider
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Two-factor authentication is required, but second factor provider is not available. Please contact the administrator..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.OldPasswordIncorrect
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Old password incorrect..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.PasswordNotEnoughNonAlphanumericChars
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password doesn't contain enought non-alphanumeric chars. Required number is {0}..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.PasswordResetMailSent
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to A mail with a password reset link has been successfully sent to your email address. Please check your mailbox and finish a password change procedure..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.PasswordResetTokenInvalid
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unable to set a new password. Invalid, already used or expired link (is only valid for a certain time)..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.PasswordSent
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Your password has been sent to you..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.PasswordTooShort
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password too short. Minimum required lenghts is {0}..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.RegisterNewUser_PortalBaseUrlNotConfigured
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to An error occured when generating a confirmation email, please contatct administrator. .

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.RegisterNewUserTemplate
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to Subject: Please confirm your new account Dear new user,
A new account for <%PortalBaseUrl%> has been created for you.
Username - <%UserName%> Name - <%Name%> First name - <%FirstName%>
Please confirm your registration and activate your account with this link. <%PortalBaseUrl%>ConfirmEmail?token=<%Token%>&userId=<%UserId%>
Why did you get this email? You or someone else has created an account
Kind regards
Application support.

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.ResetPasswordMail_PortalBaseUrlNotConfigured
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to An error occured while generating a password reset email, please contact the administrator..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.ResetPasswordMailTemplate
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to Subject: Password Reset request Dear <%Name%>,
You or someone else recently requested to reset the password for your account with username '<%UserName%>'.
If you did not make this request, simply disregard this email. It will become invalid after <%TokenValidityHours%> hours or the first use, so you do not have to worry about your account being taken over.
To choose a new password, please click the following link: <%PortalBaseUrl%>ResetPassword?Token=<%Token%>&UserName=<%EscapedUserName%>
Have [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.TokenInvalid
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid, already used or expired link (is only valid for a certain time)..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.UserIdNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to User Id not found in the system..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.UserManagerNotSet
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No callback for creating UserManager registered..

member.name: P:Origam.Security.Common.Resources.UserUnlockNotificationTemplate
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to Subject: User account got unlocked Hello <%FirstNameAndName%>
Your user account <%UserName%> has been unlocked by the system administrator. You are now able to login again using your known user credentials or ask for a new password in the recovery password process.
Kind regards
Application support.
